## ❌ Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## 🎯 Impact

- [ ] Blocks usage

## 📦 Input / Sample Data

## 📜 Logs / Stack Traces / Screenshots

Paste relevant logs and stack traces. Add screenshots for UI issues.

## 🔎 Suspected Area (Optional)

If you already investigated, mention likely files/modules.

## 🧪 Workarounds (Optional)

Did you find a temporary workaround?

## ℹ️ Additional Context

Add any details that could help triage quickly.
